violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine must be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2025
Ice accumulation observed in interior of walk-in freezer. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

The floor tiles throughout the back of house area (especially by fryer and prep area) were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. (this violation does not exceed original correct by date) New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
The floor tiles throughout the kitchen and walk-in cooler were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
Ceiling tile above over was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -The person that is certified in food safety has a license that expired on September 2023. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). -Application provided to establishment at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the frying area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 12/07/2023

The floor tiles in the back prep area and floor tiles in the chicken walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. Tiles observed cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
